_comment: Reference table of International Morse Code. When the app is hosted over http(s) (e.g. GitHub Pages) this file is fetched at startup. When the app is opened directly as a local file (file://), browsers block fetch() of local JSON for security reasons, so js/morse.js keeps an identical copy of this table embedded as a JavaScript object to guarantee the app always works. If you edit this file, mirror the change in the MORSE_CODE_TABLE constant near the top of js/morse.js.
